criteria.criterionText: Then the display status should be one of:
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify that the display status adheres to the constrained vocabulary without the `report.md` or Gemini live-call receipt.

criteria.criterionText: And the projection should prefer the most urgent product signal
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify the prioritization logic for product signals without the `report.md` or Gemini live-call receipt.

criteria.criterionText: And `stale` should override a previously passing status when source evidence no longer matches the projection
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify the 'stale' override behavior without the `report.md` or Gemini live-call receipt.

criteria.criterionText: And `qa-passed.promoted` should only be used when both QA pass evidence and deterministic promotion evidence exist.
criteria.llmObservationSummary: Cannot verify the conditions for using 'qa-passed.promoted' without the `report.md` or Gemini live-call receipt.
